flicker-fix2: zombie-placeholder risk when streamingFinalized -> RESOLVED (gated re-injection on !streamingFinalized).

notes: Reviewed combined diff: streaming flicker root-cause fix (dead isStreaming guard keyed by messageId vs partId-keyed streamingPartTexts; + placeholder survival across lagging server snapshots) and HorizontalPager refactor.
